name: Kina Collins
bio: Kina Collins is listed as a Democratic candidate in the 2026 IL-07 primary field. She has previously run in IL-07 and re-entered the race after the incumbent retirement. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)

jacket.note: ~$55K raised as of Feb 25, 2026 (FEC). FEC ID: H0IL07167
jacket.donors_note: No itemized donor breakdown available yet. total_raised reflects FEC aggregate total (H0IL07167) — detailed donor records pending ETL import.

career_history.highlight: Defeated 30-year incumbent Danny K. Davis in 2022 Democratic primary

policy_platform.position: Supports federal tenant protections, community land trusts, and limits on corporate landlords.
Supports single-payer healthcare; no corporate PAC money pledge.
Opposes U.S. arms shipments to Israel; one of the most vocal progressive voices in Congress on Gaza ceasefire.

social_pulse.summary: Strong positive sentiment among progressive and Palestinian-American communities. No-PAC pledge builds grassroots credibility. Growing national profile.
